data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for payout-ready affiliate ledger and statement exports.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Payout-ready affiliate ledger and statement exports', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the booking and member management processes but do not include any checks or validations related to the affiliate ledger or statement exports. This indicates a gap in the coverage of the specified requirement, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of validation for payout-ready affiliate ledger and statement exports.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the payout-ready affiliate ledger and statement exports.
